{{Quote|My predecessor was a champion of discipline over talent, but the pilots I inherited are pretty determined.|Luke Skywalker, on Yakown Reth|<ref name="Rebel Stand" />}}
'''Yakown Reth''' served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], leading first [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|Green Squadron]] and then [[Blackmoon Squadron]] of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing starfighters]]. He did not favor the newer tactics employed against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], preferring a more straightforward approach in dogfighting. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Reth and the Blackmoons were stationed on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] in the wake of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Fall of Coruscant]]. The captain was a elite [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], though the constant action over Borleias took a toll on him physically. He also began to question the motives of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], unable to understand why he was allowing the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' to die off piece by piece. The stress of the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]] finally took its toll on Reth, rendering him paranoid. Upon [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke's]] return from his expedition to Coruscant it was stated that, only that day, Blackmoon Squadron had lost three pilots, including its commander and second in command. He was relieved of duty due to battle-stress-induced paranoia. Eventually, Luke Skywalker took his place as Blackmoon leader.
